subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1900
subcodes.first_line: The justice of God is a difficult subject and requires much reflection upon our Lord's Words... Paraclete means the Holy Spirit... Regarding the use of beads
subcodes.subjects: @differences in human capacity, @justice and mercy, @diversity an attribute; requirement of existence, @maintainance of degrees in society, @many are called but few are chosen, @chastisement and requital
